applied_optimizations.name: Triton im2col + torch.mm
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented convolution using Triton im2col kernel to transform input to column format, followed by torch.mm for GEMM. Correct but slower due to Python loop overhead and kernel launch overhead for 16.7M rows.

attempted_but_failed.name: Direct Triton convolution kernel
attempted_but_failed.reason: Correct but 54x slower (412ms) due to fine-grained parallelism causing excessive kernel launches

attempted_but_failed.name: Triton GEMM with tl.dot fp16
attempted_but_failed.reason: Worked but precision issues caused correctness failures

notes: Baseline: PyTorch nn.Conv2d with MIOpen backend achieves 7.68ms
100% of GPU time is in miopenSp3AsmConv_v30_3_1_gfx9_fp32_f2x3_stride1 (assembly-optimized convolution)
Triton tl.dot works with fp16 inputs on ROCm when using proper stride-based indexing
Direct convolution kernel approach has too much kernel launch overhead for large spatial dimensions
im2col approach requires ~5GB for full batch, need per-batch processing
Current Triton implementation is correct but 54x slower - needs further optimization
